title: Grilled Padron Peppers with Smoky Skewers
description: A flavorful and simple Peruvian-inspired dish featuring smoky skewers paired with charred padron peppers.

ingredients.name: Optional: Grilled garlic, lemon wedges for serving
Skewer-friendly vegetables (such as cherry tomatoes, onions, mushrooms) for skewers

instructions: Thread delicate peppers, skewer-friendly vegetables (if using), and padron peppers onto smoky skewers.
Brush skewers with olive oil and season with salt.
Grill skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until peppers are charred.
Serve skewers hot with grilled garlic and lemon wedges (if using).
Optional: Grill padron peppers separately for an additional 2-3 minutes, until slightly charred.
